children.text: Last summer, I went to a summer camp.
children.cn: 去年夏天，我去了夏令营。
children.statement: went 是 go 的过去式。
children.explanation: go 的过去式是不规则的 went。

children.text: At first, I was nervous because I didn't know anyone there.
children.cn: 起初，我很紧张，因为我不认识那里的任何人。
children.notes: at first: 起初；anyone: 任何人
children.statement: anyone 在否定句中表示“任何人”。
children.explanation: 在否定句和疑问句中，通常用 anyone 替换 someone。

children.text: But I decided to be brave and make new friends.
children.cn: 但我决定勇敢一点，去结交新朋友。
children.notes: decide: 决定；make friends: 结交朋友
children.statement: decided 是规则动词过去式。
children.explanation: 以 e 结尾的动词加 d。

children.text: I talked to other kids and played games with them.
children.cn: 我与其他孩子交谈，并和他们一起玩游戏。
children.notes: talk to: 与...交谈；kids: 孩子
children.explanation: them 是人称代词宾格形式。

children.text: By the end of the camp, I had many new friends and felt much more confident.
children.cn: 到夏令营结束时，我有了许多新朋友，并且感到自信多了。
children.notes: by the end of: 到...结束时
children.statement: much more confident 意为“自信得多”。
children.explanation: much 修饰比较级表示程度。

children.text: I learned that being brave and friendly can help me overcome my fears.
children.cn: 我学到了勇敢和友好可以帮助我克服恐惧。
children.notes: learned: 学习（learn的过去式）；overcome: 克服；fears: 恐惧
children.statement: learned 是 learn 的另一种过去式形式。
children.explanation: learn 的过去式可以是 learned (美式常用) 或 learnt (英式常用)。

children.text: It made me feel good and proud of myself.
children.cn: 这让我感觉很好，并为自己感到自豪。
children.notes: made: 使（make的过去式）；proud of: 为...自豪
children.statement: made 是 make 的过去式。
